title: ETE Artefact Metadata
description: Schema for meta.json within each artefact directory. Describes the artefact payload including type, hash, source provenance, and timestamps.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the payload file, prefixed with 'sha256:'. Null if not computed.

size_bytes.description: Size of the payload file in bytes.

envelope_version.description: Version of the Kasumi envelope structure. 0 indicates legacy (no envelope).

correlation_id.description: Correlation identifier linking this artefact to a session/run context.

source.description: Provenance information about the system and context that produced this artefact.

session_id.description: Session identifier within the producing system.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the artefact was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the artefact was last updated.

extra.description: System-specific metadata preserved but not interpreted by ETE.
